final:
module RefModule (
    input wire reset,
    input wire clk,
    input wire [3:0] d,
    output reg [3:0] q
);

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            q <= d;
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
